summary: Completed testing of Admin Orders page redesign and GP Role Assignment features. All 5 requested features verified working correctly. Backend tests: 7/7 passed. Frontend UI tests: All features verified.

features_verified.feature: Admin Orders page redesign - stat cards, table headers, visual hierarchy
features_verified.verification: 5 stat cards visible (Total Orders, Pending, Overdue, Paid, Collected). Dark gradient table header with white text. Clean visual hierarchy with rounded-2xl cards and gradient backgrounds.

features_verified.feature: Admin Orders page - school payments grouping with expandable tranches
features_verified.verification: Schools with multiple tranches show expandable rows (VVhs - 2 tranches, Delhi Public School - 3 tranches). Clicking expand button shows individual tranche details with amount, due date, and status.

features_verified.feature: Admin Orders page - overdue/pending status indicators with left border colors
features_verified.verification: Overdue rows have red left border (border-l-4 border-l-red-400). Pending rows have amber left border (border-l-4 border-l-amber-400). Status badges show 'Overdue (Xd)' with days count.

features_verified.feature: Admin Orders page - document icons (invoice/receipt) in actions column
features_verified.verification: FileText icon for invoice and Receipt icon for receipt are implemented in actions column. Icons appear when invoice_url or receipt_url is present on payment record.

features_verified.feature: GP Role Assignment - GP Manager role instead of Growth Partner
features_verified.verification: When GP status is changed to 'active', team user is created with role_name='GP Manager' (not 'Growth Partner'). Verified via API test - created GP, activated it, confirmed team_user has role_name='GP Manager'.

features_verified.feature: GP Self Onboarding - Training module with 7 steps
features_verified.verification: GP Onboarding page loads correctly with 6 main steps (Personal Info, Bank Details, Contract, Payment, Kit Delivery, Training). Training step shows all 7 training modules (About Company, About Skill, Implementation Models, Product Training, Target Audiences, Pricing Training, Software Training).

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed React key warning in AdminOrders.jsx - changed <> to <React.Fragment key={group.school_id}> for grouped school payments
seed_data_creation: Created test GP records with TEST_ prefix for role assignment testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Orders page has been redesigned with: 1) 5 stat cards (Total Orders, Pending, Overdue, Paid, Collected), 2) Dark gradient table header, 3) Expandable school payment groups with tranches, 4) Left border colors for overdue (red) and pending (amber) status, 5) Document icons for invoice/receipt. GP Role Assignment now correctly assigns 'GP Manager' role (not 'Growth Partner') when GP is activated. GP Onboarding training module has all 7 steps implemented.
